name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the box or its documentation
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement

---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. For example: "I am always frustrated when..."

## Describe the Solution You Would Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You Have Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
